title: SimEPR: An Open-Source GUI for General cw-EPR Simulation (Isotropic and Anisotropic), Mixture Fitting, and Publication-Ready Analysis
description: SimEPR is an open-source application for the simulation, multi-component fitting, and publication-ready analysis of continuous-wave EPR spectra. It couples a fast analytical engine for isotropic radicals with a general spin-Hamiltonian diagonalisation engine and powder averaging for anisotropic g- and A-tensors, high-spin systems, zero-field splitting, and multifrequency EPR. Includes parameter uncertainties, AIC/BIC model selection, parallel EasySpin export, reference standards, and batch/kinetic processing.

creators.name: Khan, Md Sakib Hasan
creators.affiliation: Research School of Chemistry, The Australian National University; Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering, Khulna University of Engineering & Technology
